textByHash.a9c530c4372ebe396a3a28dbcd0bc5e093c7c890: I'm here to trade with the dwarves here on behalf of Fortis. Stonecutter Outpost is the main supplier of the stone we use for building.
textByHash.7fbd1e874a5135b7c06106e9343c7f9b71947ba7: Well it's significantly better than dealing with the dwarves in Cam Torum, but they're still not the easiest to work with.
